quarantine.note: Suggestion likely has the right B46+ to B46-SBS merge, but all plus-route decisions are held until the explicit ACE/MTA plus-route policy is implemented.

original_rationale: Both records refer to the B46 Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue in Brooklyn. The ACE dataset dictionary uses 'B46+' as its internal naming convention for SBS routes (same pattern as B44+, M15+, BX12+, Q44+, BX41+, etc. which are all SBS routes). The MTA Automated Camera Enforcement page explicitly lists 'B46-SBS, Utica Av / Malcolm X Blvd' as an ACE route, confirming B46-SBS is the official name. The route_utica-ave-sbs record has richer payload (borough, streets, description, program) that complements the sparse route_b46-plus record. The variant mismatch is merely a labeling convention difference ('+' vs '-SBS'), not a genuine route variant distinction.
required_follow_up: Implement and validate explicit ACE/MTA plus-route identity policy before promoting this decision.
Do not apply this packet directly to data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
